request.description: Startup registration: required files founder_id, business_registration_proof; optional support_affiliation_letter, tin_certificate. Files stored in DB (documents.file_data).

request.description: Investor registration: attach registration_doc, trade_license, tin_certificate (memory upload → DB). preferred_industry is required.

formdata.description: Plain text or valid JSON string (e.g. array). Stored as TEXT on mentors.

formdata.description: Optional. Short intro video (stored in DB as BYTEA).
Optional. One or more certification files (repeat key in Postman or add rows).

request.description: Mentor self-registration via /api/auth/register. intro_video and certifications optional. Files use same documents table as Startup/Investor (mentor_id + file_data). Run 001_init.sql alters: documents.mentor_id, mentors.required_time_slots TEXT + jsonb→text DO block. Change email before re-run.

item.name: Startup Discover
item.description: Startup JWT. Base: /api/startups/discover. GET search (no admin approval). POST request/interest/apply/favorite require approved account. apply = full JSON payload + DB-enriched profile; saved to discover_*_applications.

request.description: Returns { mentors, pagination }. Only active, admin-approved mentors. is_favorite when startup profile exists.
Returns { investors, pagination }.
Requires admin-approved startup. Creates mentorship_requests row (pending).
Requires admin-approved startup. Upserts startup_investor_interests.

Returns same shape with investor block merged from DB (name/location/fundingRange fall back to DB when omitted). Required: application.startupProject, application.requestedAmount, application.messageToInvestor. Persists to discover_investor_applications.

Mentor-specific application. Required: application.startupProject, application.messageToMentor. Response: mentor, application, documents (incl. introVideo, cvOrBio), summary (mentorshipFocus instead of requestedAmount). Persists to discover_mentor_applications.
Body type: mentor | investor (must match profileId). Toggle: POST again removes bookmark. Requires admin-approved startup.
Startup user JWT. Returns name, founder, greeting.
Separate from GET /api/startups/documents (raw file list). This returns uploaded vs missing checklist.
Upcoming mentorship_sessions with join_link and agenda from notes/subject.
Actions: mark_notifications_read (optional payload.notification_ids), create_project_hint, request_investment_hint.

item.name: Chat & video
item.description: Startup–investor threads: messages, files (BYTEA), notifications, and video session metadata (room_id + status). Startup-only mount: /api/startups/chat. Shared (Startup or Investor): /api/chat.

item.name: Startup JWT — /api/startups/chat
item.description: Requires role Startup. Paths mirror /chat/* under /api/startups/chat.

request.description: Startup JWT: required body field investor_id (integer).
Marks peer messages read for your role when opened.
Alternatively use field "text" instead of "body".
multipart field name: file
Returns unread_chat_total, conversations_with_unread, video_alerts, unread_chat_video_notifications.
Creates room_id (UUID); notifies peer. Ends any prior ringing/active call on this thread.
Latest call: status ringing|active|ended|missed|none; session_participants lists join/leave audit.
Use "action": "stop" to clear screen_share_user_id (must be the user who started).
Returns binary for message_type=file (chat_message_id from upload response).

item.name: Startup or Investor JWT — /api/chat
item.description: Same routes as startup folder; use Investor JWT with startup_id when creating a thread.

request.description: Use with Startup JWT.
Use with Investor JWT; startup_id is startups.startup_id.
Marks peer messages read for your role when opened.
Alternatively use field "text" instead of "body".
multipart field name: file
Returns unread_chat_total, conversations_with_unread, video_alerts, unread_chat_video_notifications.
Creates room_id (UUID); notifies peer. Ends any prior ringing/active call on this thread.
Latest call: status ringing|active|ended|missed|none; session_participants lists join/leave audit.
Use "action": "stop" to clear screen_share_user_id (must be the user who started).
Returns binary for message_type=file (chat_message_id from upload response).

item.name: Mentor chat & video

unread_chat_total, video_alerts, unread_mentor_chat_notifications.

request.description: PUT multipart; only include fields you change. Files stored in DB (mentor_documents.file_data).

body.raw:
{
"mentorship_session_id":1,
"report_title":"Session 1 Summary",
"summary":"Discussed pitch, GTM, and investor readiness.",
"action_items":["Refine pitch deck","Collect traction metrics"],
"next_steps":["Schedule follow-up","Share updated deck"],
"progress_rating":4,
"startup_feedback":"Very helpful and structured",
"mentor_notes":"Need to review the next deck version"
}

formdata.value: Smart irrigation solutions for Ethiopian farmers.
Water scarcity and inefficient irrigation systems.
IoT-enabled smart irrigation that reduces water waste.

formdata.description: Optional YYYY-MM-DD; leave empty to derive from timeline

request.description: Multipart form fields: text keys `name`, `summary`, `requiredFunding`, `industry`, `stage`, `problem`, `solution`, `expectedImpact`, optional `startDate`/`endDate`, `mentor_requested` (true/false), `mentor_preferred_field`, JSON strings `timeline`, `goals`, `market`. Optional bulk JSON in `data` or `payload` merges first then text fields override. Files: pitch_deck, business_plan, financial_projection (required), tax_clearance, cover_photo, demo_video (optional). Memory upload → BYTEA.
Startup JWT. Returns { projects: [] } until admin approves account.
Replace 1 with project_id. Empty until approved.
Mentor sessions are startup-scoped in DB (see response note).
